extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won Stage 2 sprinting past HODEG Alvaro after cutting right and blocking BOASSON HAGEN, likely facing commissaire review.
tactical_patterns: MORKHOFF lost HODEG leadout positioning on pre-finish roundabout, forcing solo effort against Polish national team interference.
Lotto-Jumbo hijacked Quick-Step leadout in final 300m when HODEG failed to follow MORKHOFF's wheel through gap.
VAN POPPEL hesitated fatally when ACKERMANN cut right across his line, losing podium by waiting instead of committing.

rider_signals.HODEG Alvaro: negative: lost MORKHOFF's wheel at critical roundabout moment despite being positioned perfectly, suggesting concentration lapse under high speed
rider_signals.MORKHOFF Michael: neutral: isolated against Polish national team bracketing tactics with no Quick-Step support, forced premature launch
rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: positive: positioned strongly on right in final 200m until ACKERMANN's questionable lateral move blocked momentum
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Danny: negative: froze when ACKERMANN cut across, showing hesitation that cost podium when HODEG filled gap
